# canExportSlideshowItem(at:toApplication:)

**Instance Method**

Reports whether the export button should be enabled for a slideshow item.

## Declaration

```swift
optional func canExportSlideshowItem(at index: Int, toApplication applicationBundleIdentifier: String!) -> Bool
```

## Return Value

[doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/true] if the export button should be enabled for an item; otherwise [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/false].

## Providing Slideshow Information

- **numberOfSlideshowItems()**: Returns the number of items in a slideshow.
- **slideshowItem(at:)**: Returns the item for a given index
- **nameOfSlideshowItem(at:)**: Returns the display name for item at the specified index.

items.description: Returns the number of items in a slideshow.
items.name: numberOfSlideshowItems()

items.description: Returns the item for a given index
items.name: slideshowItem(at:)
